featureName: Compte Seido Badge Consistency & Non-Invited Filtering
description: Replace all 'Non invité' negative badges with 'Compte Seido' positive badges. Fix data flow bugs where has_account is missing, causing non-invited contacts to appear in confirmation selectors.

userStories.title: Fix data flow: has_account on allTenants + dedup for confirmation
userStories.description: Fix allTenants Branch 2 to copy has_account from BuildingTenant. Deduplicate allTenants before passing to ParticipantConfirmationSelector.
acceptanceCriteria: allTenants Branch 2 maps has_account from tenant object
ParticipantConfirmationSelector receives deduplicated tenants with has_account
Non-invited tenants excluded from confirmation selector
userStories.notes: Added Set<string> dedup + has_account mapping in allTenants Branch 2

userStories.title: Fix data flow: has_account in Step 4 confirmation + edit page
userStories.description: Add has_account to data.contacts in confirmation summary. Filter non-invited from confirmation display. Map has_account on providers in edit page.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 4 confirmation contacts include has_account field
Non-invited contacts filtered from confirmation locataires
Edit page maps has_account on providers
userStories.notes: Added has_account to all 3 contact paths in Step 4, to edit page providers, and Compte Seido badge in renderContactList

userStories.title: Badge flip: all Non invité → Compte Seido across UI
userStories.description: Replace all negative 'Non invité' badges with positive 'Compte Seido' badges across: contact-selector modal, contact-selector dropdown, contact-section, assignment-section-v2 (3 sites), programming-modal-FINAL (2 sites).
acceptanceCriteria: contact-selector.tsx modal shows 'Compte Seido' badge when auth_user_id present
ui/contact-selector.tsx dropdown shows 'Compte Seido' when has_account true
ui/contact-section.tsx shows 'Compte Seido' for all section types (not just providers)
assignment-section-v2.tsx 3 badge sites flipped to Compte Seido
programming-modal-FINAL.tsx 2 badge sites flipped to Compte Seido
Zero 'Non invité' remaining in intervention UI components
userStories.notes: All 8 badge sites flipped. Zero 'Non invité' remaining in components/. 11 'Compte Seido' locations confirmed.
